description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on every push to the master branch and on all pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.11) and operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-13). For each job, check out the repository, install Python, upgrade and install dependencies, and run unit tests with pytest on ubuntu-latest and macOS, and with a special setup on Windows.
